svg.title: Conductor architecture — complete workflow swimlane
svg.desc: Four-lane swimlane diagram. Main flow top to bottom covers the EPIC cycle. Bugfix mini-cycle is shown as a separate section at the bottom, referenced from the main flow.
svg.text: User approves before any code is written
Phase 2 — EPIC cycle (2A–2F, repeats per EPIC)
User reviews diff, writes commit, confirms to continue
All available skills (active throughout any phase)
Bugfix / Small Change Track (referenced from scope lock above)
